note: Portfolio Lockdown v1.0: synced with the live public gallery data.

works.title: Burned Motion / Razorback
works.desc: A red motion study with a charging razorback form and a rough, energetic surface. The piece leads the portfolio as a signature work.

works.title: Soul Current
works.desc: A blue fluid-motion piece built around suspended color, soft pressure, and depth. It anchors the Fluid Soul direction.

works.title: Sunflower Mandala
works.desc: A bright organic pattern study centered on a sunflower form. The piece adds warmth and structure to the collection.

works.title: Cross Current
works.desc: A layered blue current study with crossing movement and a quiet name-form quality. It sits between abstract surface and studio identity.

works.title: Release
works.desc: A restrained lettering piece set into a washed blue field. The composition keeps the message simple and atmospheric.

works.title: Electric Bloom
works.desc: A compact digital collage with bright color, layered texture, and sharp contrast. It gives the collection a more experimental edge.

works.title: We Are Not Descended
works.desc: A wood-burned lettering piece that uses the natural round as part of the composition. The bark edge, cracks, and burned marks carry the material character.

works.title: Rainline Notes
works.desc: A vertical texture study built from repeated marks and soft blue movement. It reads as surface, rhythm, and weather.

works.title: Blue Field
works.desc: A quiet blue texture field focused on grain, tone, and surface movement. It functions as a supporting study rather than a main signature piece.

works.title: Love, Weathered
works.desc: A word-based texture piece with a worn, layered surface. The lettering and background work together as a single weathered field.

works.title: Blessed Water
works.desc: A soft lettering piece set into a pale blue waterlike field. The open space lets the words and wash breathe.

works.title: Infinite Love
works.desc: A saturated lettering study built around a bold central word form. The color and script carry the energy of the piece.

works.title: Infinite Love, Blue Variation
works.desc: A cooler blue-violet variation of the Infinite Love lettering study. The palette shifts the same phrase into a calmer register.

works.title: You Are Priceless
works.desc: A direct lettering piece centered on reassurance and value. It belongs with the word-based expression work.

works.title: Inkspirations Studio Mark
works.desc: A studio mark exploration using blue lettering, splash, and atmosphere. It supports the identity system around the artwork.

works.title: Studio Blue Identity Card
works.desc: A compact identity card for Inkspirations Studios. It presents the studio voice in a clean public-facing format.

works.title: Inkspirations Logo Lockup
works.desc: A clean logo lockup pairing calligraphic emphasis with the studio name. It is organized as supporting identity work.

works.title: Say No
works.desc: A stark typographic poster built from scale, contrast, and compression. The direct wording gives the piece its structure.

works.title: Small Town Teacher
works.desc: A compact identity mark with a handmade, personal tone. It shows a softer side of the studio system.

works.title: Inkspirations Coasters / Functional Art
works.desc: A functional art project for coaster sets, usable surfaces, and product-ready studio objects. These studies connect the artwork to objects people can live with.

works.title: Robert's Poem / Writing Piece
works.desc: A dedicated writing feature for Robert's poem and the language side of Inkspirations Studios. The piece gives the studio world a quieter verbal entry point.
